data.title: 'Big Short' Fame Steve Eisman Says Nvidia's 'Best Days Are Not Behind It' But Trump Is The Wild Card In Current Market
data.description: Renowned investor Steve Eisman continues to bet big on AI, unfazed by current valuations in the segment, or tariff-related uncertainties.

data.title: Hong Kong Post Operator Refuses To Collect Trump Tariffs, Calls US An Unreasonable Bully
data.description: Hong Kong Post announced on Wednesday it has suspended sea mail services for goods to the United States and will halt air mail services for items containing goods starting April 27, citing "bullying" U.S. tariffs.

data.title: Dogecoin Bull Run Could Start After False Break, Says Chartist Even As Key Indicator Flashes 'Sell' Signal
data.description: A widely followed cryptocurrency analyst predicted a possible bull run for Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) on Tuesday, following a false break in the dog-themed memecoin’s trajectory.

data.title: Trump-Appointed FCC Chair To Europe: If You're Worried About Elon Musk's Starlink After The Ukraine Threat, 'Just Wait For The CCP's Version…'
data.description: Trump-appointed FCC official Brendan Carr urged Europe to support Elon Musk's Starlink over Chinese alternatives, warning that hesitation over U.S. tech could open the door to greater risks from the Chinese Communist Party.

data.title: OM Token Rallies 28%, Gives Marginal Relief To Crash-Hit Holders After MANTRA Co-founder Assures 'Post-Mortem Report,' Supply Burn
data.description: Real-world asset-focused coin MANTRA (CRYPTO: OM) topped the cryptocurrency gainers list on Tuesday, recovering marginally from its weekend crash.
